staticPages.title: About Trenzura
staticPages.seoDescription: Learn about Trenzura, the Indian fashion label bringing you curated styles.

children.text: Trenzura is an Indian fashion label bringing curated styles to your doorstep. We believe fashion is a form of self-expression, and our collections are designed to help you find your unique voice.

staticPages.title: Contact us
staticPages.seoDescription: Get in touch with the Trenzura team.

children.text: Reach out to us at hello.trenzura@gmail.com for any questions, concerns, or feedback. We would love to hear from you.

Your privacy matters to us. We collect only the information necessary to process your orders and improve your shopping experience. We do not share your personal data with third parties except as required for payment processing and shipping.

We offer free shipping on all orders above ₹499. Standard shipping is ₹100. We offer a 15-day easy return policy. Items must be unworn with tags attached. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the return.

By using Trenzura, you agree to these terms. All products are subject to availability. We reserve the right to cancel orders in case of stock unavailability or pricing errors. Prices are in Indian Rupees and include applicable taxes.
